_note: Real agentic benchmark config. Same agent, same tasks, with vs without each skill. Edit freely. Cost is real — each task run is a headless claude session that edits code.
tasks: Add a `separator` option to the slugify function that lets the caller choose the character used to join words (default stays '-'). Keep existing behaviour and tests passing.
Add input validation: slugify should throw a clear TypeError when called with a non-string first argument, instead of failing later. Add a short test.
Add a `maxLength` option that truncates the produced slug to at most N characters without cutting a word in the middle when avoidable.
